rationale: Educ. Code §13.002 governs frequency of local elections or petitions under Chapter 13. The proposed change is a legislative statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not an action under Chapter 13, so no conflict arises.
quote: If at an election on a proposition under this chapter the majority of the votes are cast against the proposition, another election for the same purpose may not be held earlier than the corresponding uniform election date three years after the date of the first election.
_note: Rule text concerns frequency of local school district tax elections/petitions, not legislative amendments to state-level homestead exemption amounts.
